title: ServiceNow- ITOM Consultant
description:
Service Now Consultant

Avensys is a reputed global IT professional services company headquartered in Singapore. Our service spectrum includes enterprise solution consulting, business intelligence, business process automation and managed services. Given our decade of success, we have evolved to become one of the top trusted providers in Singapore and service a client base across banking and financial services, insurance, information technology, healthcare, retail and supply chain.

We are currently looking to hire a Service Now Consultant. This is an exciting opportunity to expand your skill set, achieve job satisfaction and work-life balance. More details as below.

JOB TYPE:

Long Term Contract

A ServiceNow ITOM (IT Operations Management) Job Description typically seeks a professional to bridge the gap between IT infrastructure and business services. The role focuses on automating operations, enhancing visibility into IT assets, and ensuring high service availability.

Core Responsibilities

  • Module Implementation: Design and configure key ITOM modules, including Discovery, Service Mapping, Event Management, and Cloud Management.
  • CMDB Management: Maintain the Configuration Management Database (CMDB) to ensure data accuracy, health, and alignment with the Common Service Data Model (CSDM).
  • Discovery & Mapping: Set up MID Servers, configure patterns/probes to identify IT assets (servers, databases, network devices), and create top-down maps of business services.
  • Event Management: Integrate third-party monitoring tools (e.g., SolarWinds, Splunk, Dynatrace) and configure event correlation rules to reduce alert noise.
  • Custom Development: Write scripts (JavaScript, PowerShell, Bash) to extend platform functionality and build custom integrations using REST/SOAP APIs.

Required Skills & Qualifications

  • Experience: Typically requires 3–8 years of experience in ServiceNow development, with a heavy focus on ITOM implementations.
  • Technical Knowledge: Strong understanding of IT infrastructure, including networking (TCP/IP, DNS), firewalls, and cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

CONSULTANT DETAILS

Consultant Name: Khalid Farooq

Avensys Consulting Pte Ltd

EA Licence 12C5759

Privacy Statement: Data collected will be used for recruitment purposes only. Personal data provided will be used strictly inaccordance with the relevant data protection law and Avensys' personal information and privacy policy

postedCompany.description: Avensys is among the leaders in providing technology enabled business solutions and services. Since inception, Avensys has helped clients use IT more efficiently to improve their operations and profitability, focus on core competencies and achieve business results such as increased agility, innovation and profitable growth. Our in-depth technical knowledge coupled with industry experience and our unique methodologies enable us to successfully deliver and meet our customer’s expectations.
